---
name: Website Bug Report
about: Report a bug or issue with the ceph.io website
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug, website
assignees: ""
---

> [!IMPORTANT]
> This repository is for issues related to the ceph.io website only.
>
> For Ceph product bugs, cluster issues, performance problems, RADOS/RGW/CephFS issues, or other technical Ceph platform problems, please use the official tracker:
>
> https://tracker.ceph.com/

## Bug Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the problem.

---

## Affected Page / URL

Provide the affected page URL(s).

Example:

```text
https://ceph.io/en/news/blog/2026/example-post/
```

---

## Current Behavior

Describe what currently happens.

---

## Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

---

## Steps To Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. Observe the issue

---

## Screenshots / Recordings

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain the issue.

---

## Environment

Please complete the following information:

- OS:

  - [ ] Linux
  - [ ] macOS
  - [ ] Windows
  - [ ] Other

- Browser:

  - [ ] Chrome
  - [ ] Firefox
  - [ ] Safari
  - [ ] Edge
  - [ ] Other

- Browser Version:

---

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
